Description: An introductory poster to the greatest superhero movie of the millennium. This is the best deconstruction of the 'real-life superhero' genre and it came at a time when said genre barely even existed. M. Night Shyamalan’s 'Unbreakable' is the ultimate real world superhero film, stripping down the origin story elements to their very core while ruminating on the philosophical and myth-based folklore that gave rise to most of the modern gritty superhero stories in the first place.
Title: Unbreakable
